title: Berlin U-Bahn Fine - Quick Summary
items: **A Berlin U-Bahn fine is usually a EUR 60 EBE** when you cannot show a valid ticket during control. An unstamped paper ticket is normally treated as invalid.
**Keep the receipt number.** It is the key for paying, proving a forgotten personal pass, or asking the operator to review the case.
**Do not continue travelling on the same mistake.** If the receipt does not clearly cover the onward ride, buy and validate a correct ticket before the next train, tram or bus.
**Forgotten personal subscriptions are different.** If the ticket is personal and was valid at the control time, show proof within 7 days; the amount may drop to a small processing fee.
**Be careful with cash pressure.** Real controls use ID, official receipts and operator payment routes. Ask for proof if something feels wrong.
